candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue label; preferable to duplicate total row 'Total Revenue'.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; lower priority than non-total 'Revenue'.
Clearly non-revenue operating income, not sales.

variables.notes: Used priority order for possible label changes over time; prefer 'Revenue' over duplicate total row.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line appears on the Income Statement. 'Personal expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' are overhead/opex, not COGS.

candidates.why: Valid overhead bucket and the only provided candidate; should be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal exists. Selected best overhead component rows from the full A-column preview. 'Personal expenses' is a major operating overhead line clearly missing from candidates, so outside-candidate selection was necessary. Excluded R&D and D&A per rules. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Personal expenses

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; useful fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable in some years.
Most specific interest expense line and preferred choice.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only; too narrow for primary mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component, not preferred as primary interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer the specific interest line, then use broader finance expense if needed. Excluded lease-interest component rows to avoid overly narrow fallback.

candidates.why: Equity total exists but includes minority interest, so it is not preferred when parent/owner equity is available.
Balancing item, not a real equity line.

final_choice.row_label: Eget kapital hänförligt till moderbolagets ägare

variables.notes: Preferred parent-equity line exists in the Balance Sheet and should be used instead of 'Total Equity' to avoid double counting minority interest in BE + MIB. This correct label was not in candidates, so outside-candidate selection was necessary. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Eget kapital hänförligt till moderbolagets ägare

candidates.why: Income statement minority interest is attribution of earnings, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct match to balance sheet minority/non-controlling interest.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet minority interest to pair with parent-equity BE and avoid double counting.
